body.title: [sprint] test_coding_prompt_byte_identical red — coding prompt drifted from pinned SHA256
body.description:
PRE-EXISTING failure (unrelated to the router cutover; found during T-inference-migrate-consumers-cutover). tests/inference/test_domain_prompts.py::test_coding_prompt_byte_identical_to_prior_ds_prompt asserts sha256(coding domain prompt) == _CODING_PROMPT_SHA256; the prompt text has drifted from the pinned constant. Decide: re-pin the SHA (accept the intentionally-updated prompt) or revert the prompt drift. Verify the change was intended before re-pinning.

**Test plan:** tests/inference/test_domain_prompts.py::test_coding_prompt_byte_identical_to_prior_ds_prompt passes (SHA re-pinned to the intended prompt or prompt reverted).

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)

[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
